title: Problem Children Are Coming from Another World, Aren't They?
overview: Izayoi Sakamaki, Asuka Kudou, and You Kasukabe, all possess skills greater than the average person. When they are summoned away to Little Garden, they are offered the deal of a life time.

title: Seems Like a Crazy Loli Clad in Japanese Clothing?
overview: As Black Rabbit explains the situation to Izayoi, the girls meet with a representative of Fores Garo and make their first enemy.

title: Sounds Like We're Doing All Sorts of Stuff in the Bath Together?
overview: Jin and Izayoi make a side bet on the upcoming gift game that could affect the future of the No-Name community. In their first gift game, the rules weren’t agreed upon beforehand stacking the odds against them.

title: It Seems Some Pervert Is After Black Rabbit?
overview: With their first victory, Izayoi has agreed to help Jin win back a former community member. But when that member attacks in the middle of the night things get off on the wrong foot.

title: The Oath Seems to Be Beyond the Stars?
overview: No-Names vs. Perseus; what seems like an easy win for Perseus is anything but. Izayoi finally gets the chance to go all out and does not disappoint those watching.

title: Looks Like the Problem Children Are Participating in a Festival?
overview: If Black Rabbit can’t catch the children before the day ends, they will leave the community. The children think they have the upper hand but Black Rabbit will show them!

title: Someone Might Get All Kissy with Asuka in the Dark?
overview: The real reason for the No-Name community involvement with the succession ceremony is explained by a mysterious prophecy held by Shiroyasha.

title: It Seems That a Great Disaster Will Come with the Playing of a Flute?
overview: The main Gift Game to celebrate the Rise of the Fire Dragon will be Ayesha Ignis Fatuus of Will-O-Wisp and Kasukabe You of the No-Names. Before the end of the celebration the prophecy will come true.

title: It Seems That the Smell of Death That Brings About Disaster Is Growing Throughout the Town?
overview: The game has been put on hold while accusations of misconduct are discussed. Asuka is given a gift from the Fairies.

title: It Seems That the Problem Children Prove Who's on Top?
overview: Izayoi has figured out the riddle of the “Pied Piper of Hamelin” as Asuka shows off her new friend.
